text: やだ、本当に鱗が光ってる……

発光物質がいっぱい詰まってるのね。
かなりのコクを出せることは
間違いないわ。

せっかくだから、鮮度を落とさず
料理させてもらうわね！

新たな高級料理の予感がするわ。
どうもありがとう！
Oh my, look at that. It really glows...

It must be filled with all sorts of
bioluminescent material.
Just what I need to make a real tasty soup.

And I wouldn't want to waste a second of
freshness, so I'll get right to it!

This is going to make an amazing new dish.
Thanks so much!
